title: Random Things for Fabric
description:
Stupid Mod that adds stuff to the game 
(Nothing has any coherence what so ever)
body:
This is a very stupid mod that adds:

- Baked Beans
- A fully native Spanish translation
- and a new ore: the Dinbi ore (armor and tools not included with current release ~~(never will)~~)

  
and that's it for now. I'll probably keep adding more stuff as time passes
